tasks.description: Add pre-validation quality gate before supervisor review
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts: Implement configurable threshold system that validates AI output structure, syntax, and basic requirements before sending to supervisor. Must catch malformed responses early. Add flags for code_completeness, syntax_valid, has_tests. Default: block if any false.

tasks.description: Relax supervisor rejection criteria in orchestrator config
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts: Change rejection thresholds from strict (current) to production-ready. Lower confidence_threshold from 0.9 to 0.7, increase max_feedback_rounds from 2 to 4, enable auto_approve for low-risk changes (tests, docs). Must preserve safety for critical paths.

tasks.description: Integrate quality gate into orchestrator execution flow
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts: Insert quality-gate-config validation after AI response, before supervisor submission. If gate fails, trigger auto-retry with enhanced prompt. Log gate results to identify common failure patterns. Must not increase latency beyond 500ms.

tasks.description: Add complexity-based routing in task validator
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts: Implement risk scoring (low/medium/high) based on file size, imports, critical paths. Route low-risk to relaxed criteria, high-risk to strict. Score factors: file_lines<100=low, has_db_access=high, test_only=low. Return risk_level with validation.

tasks.description: Wire complexity scoring into orchestrator approval logic
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts: Use task-complexity-validator risk_level to select approval threshold from orchestrator-config. Low-risk tasks use relaxed criteria, high-risk uses strict. Add metric logging for approval_rate_by_risk. Must route decisions within existing flow.
